title: Lowcountry Weekend Starter
subject: Port Royal Sounder No. 1: markets, oysters, and a few local favorites
preheader: A first pass at the kind of useful local roundup this newsletter can become.
intro: This first issue is a compiled draft built from the directory and calendar sources already in Port Royal Sounder. The idea is simple: a small handful of places to try, events worth catching, and a short list of sources we think are worth watching each week.

items.name: The Kitchen
items.note: A strong prepared-food stop for grab-and-go meals, coffee, baked goods, catering, and pantry extras.

items.name: Herban Market & Cafe
items.note: A scratch-made market cafe with breads, pastries, fresh food, and a natural-products feel that fits the local roundup well.

items.name: Cypress Wetlands
items.note: One of the easiest local walks for birding, especially when you want something beautiful and low-effort close to town.

items.name: Port Royal Farmers Market
items.note: The anchor weekly market in this project, with local produce, seafood, meat, cheese, honey, flowers, and bread.

items.name: Downtown Beaufort Farmers' Market
items.note: A useful downtown stop for produce and prepared foods if you want something central and easy to combine with errands.

items.name: Farmers' Market of Bluffton
items.note: Worth the drive when you want a larger Thursday mix of local farms, makers, and specialty vendors.

items.name: 2026 FFF Oyster Roast
items.note: Friday, March 13 at Live Oaks Park. A classic Port Royal-style community event and an easy first pick for the calendar.

items.name: Radiance Run 5K
items.note: Saturday, March 14. A local community race that fits the kind of civic and neighborhood event we want to surface.

items.name: Third Thursday - Historic Port Royal Foundation
items.note: Thursday, March 19. Exactly the kind of recurring local event that deserves a reliable home in both the calendar and newsletter.

items.name: 4th Annual Spring Symposium
items.note: March 20 and 21 at USCB Center for the Arts, with a more academic and cultural angle than the usual weekend roundup.

items.name: Town of Port Royal Calendar
items.note: One of the most useful official feeds for town events, meetings, and community announcements.

items.name: Visit Beaufort Events
items.note: Useful for larger public events and tourism-facing happenings that still matter for locals.

items.name: USCB Center for the Arts
items.note: A strong arts and performance source that should likely feed both the newsletter and calendar regularly.
